content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Reviewed all 3 changed files (service.rs, task_prompt_contract.rs, project_run_record_test.rs) end-to-end. Traced the core parsing logic in `split_bead_description_scope` through several input scenarios — section recognition, boundary detection, section transitions, and the interaction between embedded `## Acceptance Criteria` headings and the contract shape validator all behave correctly. The duplicate-heading detection in `validate_canonical_prompt_shape` is a strict improvement over the previous first-match logic. The out-of-order detection using canonical-order windows is sound. All 100 relevant tests pass. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
